commands.name: generate
commands.description: Operations related to generation of code.

commands.name: client
commands.description:
Operations related to generating client 
project(s).

options.name: --clientFolderName
options.description:
If client folder is provided, generated files will be 
placed here instead of the project root.

options.name: --disableCodingRules
options.description: Disable ATC-Coding-Rules

options.name: --excludeEndpointGeneration
options.description: Exclude endpoint generation

options.name: --httpClientName
options.description:
If provided this name will be added as the client name 
in endpoint files.

options.name: --optionsPath
options.description: Path to options json-file

options.name: --outputPath
options.description: Path to generated project (directory)

options.name: --projectPrefixName
options.description:
Project prefix name (e.g. 'PetStore' becomes 
'PetStore.Api.Generated')

options.name: --removeNamespaceGroupSeparatorInGlobalUsings
options.description:
Remove space between namespace groups in 
GlobalUsing.cs

options.name: --specificationPath
options.description:
Path to Open API specification (directory, file or 
url)

options.name: --useProblemDetailsAsDefaultResponseBody
options.description:
Use ProblemDetails as default responsen 
body

options.name: --validate-modelNameCasingStyle
options.description:
Set casingStyle for model name. Valid values are: 
CamelCase, KebabCase, PascalCase (default), SnakeCase

options.name: --validate-modelPropertyNameCasingStyle
options.description:
Set casingStyle for model property name. Valid values 
are: CamelCase (default), KebabCase, PascalCase, SnakeCase

options.name: --validate-operationIdCasingStyle
options.description:
Set casingStyle for operationId. Valid values are: 
CamelCase (default), KebabCase, PascalCase, SnakeCase

options.name: --validate-operationIdValidation
options.description: Use operationId validation

options.name: --validate-strictMode
options.description: Use strictmode

options.name: --verbose
options.description:
Use verbose for more debug/trace 
information

project(s).

commands.name: all

options.name: --aspnet-output-type
options.description:

values are: Mvc (default), MinimalApi

options.name: --disableCodingRules
options.description: Disable ATC-Coding-Rules

options.name: --optionsPath
options.description: Path to options json-file

options.name: --outputSlnPath
options.description: Path to solution file (directory or file)

options.name: --outputSrcPath
options.description:
Path to generated src projects 
(directory)

options.description:
Path to generated test projects 
(directory)

GlobalUsing.cs

url)

options.name: --swagger-theme
options.description:

are: None, Default (default), Light, Dark

options.name: --useProblemDetailsAsDefaultResponseBody
options.description:
Use ProblemDetails as default responsen 
body

options.name: --validate-modelNameCasingStyle
options.description:
Set casingStyle for model name. Valid values are: 
CamelCase, KebabCase, PascalCase (default), SnakeCase

options.description:
Set casingStyle for model property name. Valid values

Use verbose for more debug/trace 
information

commands.description: Creates API, domain and host projects.
examples: generate server all -s c:\temp\MyProject\api.yml -p MyApi --outputSlnPath c:\temp\MyProject --outputSrcPath c:\temp\MyProject\src
